'''Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships''',<ref name="Journal9" /> also known as '''Fizzi's Slightly Used Ships''',<ref name="SS">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref> was a used-[[Starship/Legends|starship]] dealership that was located on [[Trevi IV]] and owned by a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] named [[Fiz Cor'gril|Fizzi]]. Cor'gril opened the business after deciding to settle down. It consisted of a large warehouse on the edge of [[Trevi City]]'s spaceport district capable of holding six [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] and a large lot with room for another six freighters. To the side of the showroom, there was a maintenance bay able to service two ships. The building was kept cool to both prevent wear on the ships and for client comfort. The lighting was subdued to provide a calming atmosphere for customer with the added advantage of hiding possible flaws on the merchandise. Cor'gril also owned a large warehouse on the outskirts of the city were he stored other ships he had for sale.<ref name="Journal9" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], this shop sold a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Starwind-class pleasure yacht|''Starwind''-class pleasure yacht]], ''[[Firerider]]'', bought from its previous owner [[Serdo]].<ref name="SS" />

==Ships on sale==
*[[HT-2200 medium freighter]] ''[[Karbarr's Fortress]]'' - 170,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]<ref name="Journal9" />
*[[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720 freighter]] ''[[Twilight Jumper]]'' - 10,000 credits<ref name="Journal9" />
*[[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 Short Hauler]] ''[[Cutter's Way]]'' - 55,000 credits<ref name="Journal9" />
*[[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Storm Killer]]'' - 95,000 credits<ref name="Journal9" />
*[[Gymsnor-3 light freighter/Legends|Gymsnor-3 light freighter]] ''[[Rogue Runner]]'' - 35,000 credits<ref name="Journal9" />
*[[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Nautical Star]]'' - 99,000 credits<ref name="Journal9" />
*[[Deep-X Explorer]] ''[[Wild Star]]'' - 95,000 credits<ref name="Journal9" />
*[[Starwind-class pleasure yacht]] ''[[Firerider]]''<ref name="SS">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>
